'''yomathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachbuilt|coachbuilt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachbuilt|coachbuilt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yomathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yomathithi|yomathithi]] || [[word:yomathiji|yomathiji]] || [[word:yomathishi|yomathishi]] || [[word:yomathiki|yomathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yomathuthuthu|yomathuthuthu]] || [[word:yomathujuju|yomathujuju]] || [[word:yomathushushu|yomathushushu]] || [[word:yomathukuku|yomathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yomathuthu|yomathuthu]] || [[word:yomathuju|yomathuju]] || [[word:yomathushu|yomathushu]] || [[word:yomathuku|yomathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yomathufthuf|yomathufthuf]] || [[word:yomathufjuf|yomathufjuf]] || [[word:yomathufshuf|yomathufshuf]] || [[word:yomathufkuf|yomathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yomathethe|yomathethe]] || [[word:yomatheje|yomatheje]] || [[word:yomatheshe|yomatheshe]] || [[word:yomatheke|yomatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yomathothotho|yomathothotho]] || [[word:yomathojojo|yomathojojo]] || [[word:yomathoshosho|yomathoshosho]] || [[word:yomathokoko|yomathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yomathotho|yomathotho]] || [[word:yomathojo|yomathojo]] || [[word:yomathosho|yomathosho]] || [[word:yomathoko|yomathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yomathofthof|yomathofthof]] || [[word:yomathofjof|yomathofjof]] || [[word:yomathofshof|yomathofshof]] || [[word:yomathofkof|yomathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yomathïfthïf|yomathïfthïf]] || [[word:yomathïfjïf|yomathïfjïf]] || [[word:yomathïfshïf|yomathïfshïf]] || [[word:yomathïfkïf|yomathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yomathïfthïfthïf|yomathïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yomathïfjïfjïf|yomathïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yomathïfshïfshïf|yomathïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yomathïfkïfkïf|yomathïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yomathïfthïf|yomathïfthïf]] || [[word:yomathïfjïf|yomathïfjïf]] || [[word:yomathïfshïf|yomathïfshïf]] || [[word:yomathïfkïf|yomathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yomathïfthïf|yomathïfthïf]] || [[word:yomathïfjïf|yomathïfjïf]] || [[word:yomathïfshïf|yomathïfshïf]] || [[word:yomathïfkïf|yomathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yomathæthæ|yomathæthæ]] || [[word:yomathæjæ|yomathæjæ]] || [[word:yomathæshæ|yomathæshæ]] || [[word:yomathækæ|yomathækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yomathathatha|yomathathatha]] || [[word:yomathajaja|yomathajaja]] || [[word:yomathashasha|yomathashasha]] || [[word:yomathakaka|yomathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yomathatha|yomathatha]] || [[word:yomathaja|yomathaja]] || [[word:yomathasha|yomathasha]] || [[word:yomathaka|yomathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yomathafthaf|yomathafthaf]] || [[word:yomathafjaf|yomathafjaf]] || [[word:yomathafshaf|yomathafshaf]] || [[word:yomathafkaf|yomathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yomathasha|yomathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yomathshësha|yomathshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yomathrosha|yomathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yomathmusha|yomathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yomathyasha|yomathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyomathnkshësha|goyomathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyomathnkrosha|goyomathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyomathnkmusha|goyomathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyomathnkyasha|goyomathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yomamathasha|yomamathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yomamathshësha|yomamathshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yomamathrosha|yomamathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yomamathmusha|yomamathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yomamathyasha|yomamathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyomamathnkshësha|goyomamathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyomamathnkrosha|goyomamathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyomamathnkmusha|goyomamathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyomamathnkyasha|goyomamathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yemæthasha|yemæthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yemæthshësha|yemæthshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yemæthrosha|yemæthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yemæthmusha|yemæthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yemæthyasha|yemæthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyemæthnkshësha|goyemæthnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyemæthnkrosha|goyemæthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyemæthnkmusha|goyemæthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyemæthnkyasha|goyemæthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yomfathasha|yomfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yomfathshësha|yomfathshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yomfathrosha|yomfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yomfathmusha|yomfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yomfathyasha|yomfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyomfathnkshësha|goyomfathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyomfathnkrosha|goyomfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyomfathnkmusha|goyomfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyomfathnkyasha|goyomfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
